input.weak_title: Enova Celeron 4020 128GB 4 GB 128 GB buen precio
input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: '128GB' appears twice in the title (once after model name, once as '128 GB'), duplicating information and wasting character space
'buen precio' is a non-searchable filler phrase that MELI penalizes and buyers never search for
Screen size (e.g., 14' or 15.6') is absent, which is a primary filter criterion buyers use when searching notebooks
Operating system is not mentioned (e.g., Windows 11, Linux, sin SO), which is a key purchase decision factor
Storage type (SSD vs eMMC) is not specified — '128GB SSD' vs '128GB eMMC' has very different perceived value
RAM type is not specified (DDR4) alongside the '4 GB' figure, reducing technical credibility
description_issues: The description contains zero product specifications — screen size, processor speed, RAM, storage type, OS, ports, and connectivity are all absent
'Consultar disponibilidad por mensaje' discourages immediate purchase and signals the seller may not have stock, reducing buyer confidence
No use-case context is provided (e.g., ideal for remote work, students, basic office tasks) to help buyers self-qualify
No mention of what is included in the box (charger, warranty card, documentation)
Warranty terms and after-sale support are not mentioned, which is critical for electronics buyers on MELI
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title following the structure: 'Notebook Enova Intel Celeron N4020 4GB RAM 128GB SSD [X]" [OS]' — removing the duplicate '128GB' and the phrase 'buen precio'
Fill in the DISPLAY_SIZE attribute with the exact screen size in inches, as this is the #1 filter buyers use on MELI notebooks category
Fill in OPERATING_SYSTEM attribute (Windows 11, Linux, or 'Sin sistema operativo') since this is a mandatory decision factor for buyers
Fill in STORAGE_TYPE attribute specifying whether the 128GB is SSD or eMMC, as this directly impacts perceived value and search ranking
Replace the entire description with a structured spec sheet covering: processor, RAM, storage, screen size/resolution, OS, ports (USB, HDMI), battery, weight, and warranty
Add RAM_MEMORY and RAM_MEMORY_TYPE attributes (4GB DDR4) to enable the listing to appear in filtered searches by RAM capacity
Add the term 'computadora portatil' to the description body to capture that trending search segment without keyword stuffing the title

input.weak_title: Lenovo Ideapad 3 8 GB 256 GB buen precio
input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: 'buen precio' is a filler phrase that wastes title characters and is not a searchable term — MELI penalizes promotional text in titles
Processor model and generation are completely absent (e.g., 'Intel Core i5-1235U') — this is the #1 search filter buyers use for notebooks
Storage type is not specified as 'SSD', which is a high-value differentiator and trending search term
Operating system (e.g., Windows 11) is missing from the title, which top-ranked listings always include
Screen size (15.6") is present in attributes but omitted from the title where it drives search visibility
description_issues: The description contains zero technical specifications — processor, RAM, storage, OS, GPU, ports, and battery are all absent
'Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje' signals poor seller commitment and discourages immediate purchase decisions
No use-case context is provided (e.g., suitable for students, home office, light gaming) to help buyers self-qualify
No mention of what's included in the box (charger, warranty type, invoice)
The description does not reinforce any of the product's key selling points, making it useless for both buyers and MELI's search ranking algorithm
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title to include processor name and generation, storage type, and OS — e.g., 'Notebook Lenovo IdeaPad 3 Intel Core i5 8GB RAM 256GB SSD Windows 11 15.6'
Replace the entire description with a structured spec sheet covering processor, RAM, storage type, OS, display, GPU, ports, battery, and weight
Fill in the missing critical attributes: PROCESSOR_MODEL, PROCESSOR_GENERATION, STORAGE_TYPE (SSD), OPERATING_SYSTEM, and RAM_MEMORY_TYPE so the listing qualifies for catalog matching
Remove 'buen precio' from the title and use those characters to add 'SSD' and 'Windows 11' instead
Add 'computadora portatil' and 'Intel Core' to the description naturally to capture those trending search queries

input.weak_title: HP A82ZVUA 16 GB 512 GB buen precio
input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: 'buen precio' is a promotional filler phrase that MELI penalizes and buyers never search for — it wastes title characters
Model number 'A82ZVUA' is an internal HP SKU, not a searchable product line name (e.g., HP Pavilion, HP Envy, HP Laptop 15) — buyers do not search by part number
Processor 'Ryzen 7' is only in attributes but absent from the title, missing a high-intent search term
'512 GB' has no storage type qualifier — buyers search for '512GB SSD' specifically; omitting 'SSD' loses relevant traffic
Screen size is completely absent from the title, which is one of the top filtering criteria buyers use when searching notebooks
description_issues: The description contains zero product specifications — no screen size, resolution, processor model, RAM type, storage type, OS, ports, or battery life
'Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje' signals to buyers that the seller does not know the product, destroying purchase confidence
No use-case context is provided (e.g., suitable for work, university, light gaming) to help buyers self-qualify
No mention of what's included in the box (charger, warranty, accessories), which is a common buyer concern for HP notebooks
Description does not mention the operating system, which is a decisive purchase factor for most notebook buyers
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title to include the product line name, processor, screen size, RAM, and storage type — e.g., 'Notebook HP [Pavilion/Envy] Ryzen 7 16GB RAM 512GB SSD 15.6'
Remove 'buen precio' from the title immediately, as it wastes characters and can suppress search ranking
Fill in the PROCESSOR_MODEL attribute with the specific Ryzen 7 variant (e.g., 7730U, 5700U) to qualify for catalog matching
Add SCREEN_SIZE, OPERATING_SYSTEM, RAM_MEMORY_TYPE, and STORAGE_TYPE attributes, which are mandatory filters buyers use on MELI's search page
Replace the entire description with a structured spec sheet covering: processor, RAM, storage, screen, OS, ports, battery, weight, and warranty
Add 'computadora portatil' as a keyword in the description to capture that high-volume trending search term

input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: Contains promotional phrase 'buen precio' which adds no product information and is penalized by MELI's ranking algorithm
Missing the processor name and model (e.g., Intel Celeron N4500) — the most searched technical spec for budget notebooks
Missing storage type qualifier: '128 GB' could be eMMC or SSD — this is a critical distinction that affects buyer trust and search matching
Missing screen size (14") despite it being part of the model number — buyers search by screen size
Missing the 'IdeaPad 1' product line name, which is a searchable brand sub-line term
Missing operating system (e.g., Windows 11 Home S) — a top filter criterion on MELI notebooks category
description_issues: Description contains zero product specifications — processor, RAM speed, storage type, display resolution, ports, and connectivity are all absent
Phrase 'Consultar disponibilidad por mensaje' signals low seller commitment and discourages immediate purchase decisions
No mention of included software or operating system, leaving buyers uncertain about out-of-box usability
No connectivity details (WiFi standard, Bluetooth version, USB ports, HDMI) that buyers compare across listings
No warranty information (Lenovo's official warranty period and coverage) is stated, reducing buyer confidence
No use-case framing (e.g., suitable for students, home office, basic tasks) to help buyers self-qualify
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title to: 'Notebook Lenovo IdeaPad 1 14" Intel Celeron N4500 4GB RAM 128GB eMMC Windows 11' — removing 'buen precio' and adding processor, storage type, screen size, and OS
Fill in the PROCESSOR_MODEL attribute with the exact CPU (e.g., Intel Celeron N4500) so the listing matches processor-based search filters
Fill in STORAGE_TYPE attribute as 'eMMC' (not SSD) to avoid misleading buyers and to match accurate filter navigation
Fill in OPERATING_SYSTEM attribute (Windows 11 Home in S mode) so the listing appears in OS-filtered searches

Replace the entire description with a structured spec sheet covering: processor, RAM (amount + type), storage (capacity + type), display (size + resolution), ports (USB, HDMI), wireless (WiFi + Bluetooth), OS, battery life, and Lenovo warranty terms
Add SCREEN_SIZE_INCHES and SCREEN_RESOLUTION attributes to qualify for display-size filter searches, which are among the top notebook filters on MELI
Add COLOR and WEIGHT attributes to complete the listing's attribute score, which directly impacts catalog ranking eligibility

input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: The phrase 'buen precio' is a promotional filler that violates MELI title guidelines and consumes character space without informational value
The product type is completely absent — buyers cannot tell this is a backpack/mochila from the title alone
No color is mentioned, which is a primary search filter for bags
No capacity (liters) or compatible laptop screen size is stated, preventing filtering by key specs
The model number '65.11110BL' is not a consumer-recognizable identifier and cannot stand alone as a product descriptor
description_issues: The description contains zero product information — no features, materials, dimensions, or use cases are described
Directing buyers to 'consultar por mensaje' for basic product characteristics creates friction and signals an incomplete listing, reducing conversion
'Producto en venta' is redundant on a marketplace listing and wastes the opening line, which is the most-read part of a description
No laptop compatibility is stated (e.g., fits up to 15.6" notebooks), which is the primary purchase criterion for a laptop bag
No material or construction quality details are provided to justify the purchase decision
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title to include product type, color, capacity, and compatible screen size, e.g., 'Mochila Wilson 65.11110BL Para Notebook Hasta 15.6" Negra 20L Con Porta Laptop'
Remove 'buen precio' from the title immediately and replace with a concrete product attribute (color, capacity, or material)
Fill in the COLOR, CAPACITY, COMPATIBLE_SCREEN_SIZE, and WITH_LAPTOP_COMPARTMENT attributes in the listing form
Replace the entire description with structured content covering: laptop compartment size, total capacity, materials, number of compartments, dimensions, and ergonomic features
Verify the listing is in the correct category — if this is purely a backpack without laptop-specific features, it may need to be recategorized under 'mochilas' rather than 'notebooks'
